name: Pork Chops with Maple-Pecan Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from chops.
2. Place between 2 sheets of heavy-duty plastic wrap and flatten to 1/4-inch thickness with mallet or bottom of saucepan.
3. Spread mustard on both sides of chops.
4. Combine flour and ginger; stir well. Dredge pork chops with flour mixture.
5. Coat a large nonstick skillet with vegetable oil spray.
6. Add oil, and heat over medium-high heat. Cook chops 3 minutes on each side or until nicely browned.
7. Combine maple syrup and pecans; spoon over pork chops.
8. Cover and simmer 4 minutes or until chops are tender.
